\tzpentry{ID5089}{Field Strength Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5089 introduces Field Strength Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\lim_{T \to 0} \frac{\partial^n F}{\partial T^n}\bigg|_{r_c} = \infty \quad \forall n$$
